scripts.docs:check: node scripts/check-docs.mjs && node scripts/check-api-stability.mjs && node scripts/check-readme-examples.mjs && node scripts/generate-capabilities.mjs --check && node scripts/generate-skills.mjs --check
scripts.quality:check: biome ci packages/thor/src/execution/transaction.ts packages/thor/src/ir/query-analysis.ts packages/thor/src/sql/raw.ts packages/thor/test/transaction.test.ts packages/thor/test/scoped-layers.test.ts scripts/test-packages.mjs && knip
scripts.quality:fix: biome check --write packages/thor/src/execution/transaction.ts packages/thor/src/ir/query-analysis.ts packages/thor/src/sql/raw.ts packages/thor/test/transaction.test.ts packages/thor/test/scoped-layers.test.ts scripts/test-packages.mjs
scripts.test:property: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && vitest run packages/thor/test/property-ir.test.ts
scripts.example:jsonl-etl: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @thor-examples/jsonl-etl run start
scripts.test:contract:sqlite:bun: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec bun test test-bun/sqlite.contract.test.ts
scripts.bench:stages: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-stages.mts all
scripts.bench:build: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-stages.mts build
scripts.bench:ir: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-stages.mts ir
scripts.bench:compile: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-stages.mts compile
scripts.bench:decode: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-stages.mts decode
scripts.bench:effect: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-stages.mts effect
scripts.bench:runtime-bun: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec bun scripts/bench-stages.mts all
scripts.bench:builders: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec prisma generate --schema prisma/benchmark.prisma && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-query-builders.mts
scripts.bench:report: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-hotpath.mts && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-overhead.mts && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-sqlite.mts
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && vitest run --no-file-parallelism e2e
scripts.bench:drivers: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-drivers.mts
scripts.bench:overhead: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-overhead.mts
scripts.bench:sqlite: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-sqlite.mts
scripts.bench:overhead:bun: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec bun scripts/bench-overhead.mts
scripts.bench:sqlite:bun: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec bun scripts/bench-sqlite.mts
scripts.bench:hotpath: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-hotpath.mts
scripts.bench:cache: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-cache.mts
scripts.bench:hotpath:bun: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec bun scripts/bench-hotpath.mts
scripts.bench:gate:node: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && BENCH_GATE=1 pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-hotpath.mts
scripts.bench:gate:bun: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && BENCH_GATE=1 pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec bun scripts/bench-hotpath.mts
scripts.bench:baseline:node: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && BENCH_UPDATE_BASELINE=1 pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec tsx scripts/bench-hotpath.mts
scripts.bench:baseline:bun: pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor run build && BENCH_UPDATE_BASELINE=1 pnpm --filter @gilvandovieira/thor exec bun scripts/bench-hotpath.mts
scripts.e2e: pnpm db:up && DATABASE_URL=postgres://thor:thor@localhost:5433/thor MYSQL_URL=mysql://thor:thor@localhost:3307/thor pnpm test:e2e; ec=$?; pnpm db:down; exit $ec
scripts.bench:e2e: pnpm db:up && DATABASE_URL=postgres://thor:thor@localhost:5433/thor pnpm bench:drivers; ec=$?; pnpm db:down; exit $ec
